name: The Vintage Drawing Room
desc: Baroque green damask wallpaper, black-and-white checkered floor, gilded picture frames, and chandelier lighting. Best for paint-matching greens and golds.

name: The Pastoral Cow Farm
desc: Open pasture with cows, haystacks, a red barn, and cartoon sky murals. Beginner-friendly: contrast between bright greens, hay yellows, and barn red.

name: The Brick Tavern Hall
desc: Red brick walls, exposed wooden beams, golden horse statues. Classical tavern feel; great for brick reds and wood browns.

name: The Grand Ballroom
desc: Crystal chandeliers, grand piano, banquet tables, curved staircase. Many warm yellows and deep reds; hardest because every surface is decorated.

name: The Blue Floral Parlor
desc: Blue floral wallpaper, red velvet chaise, round ceiling lamp, coat rack. Hardest for color match: dominant cool blues vs. accent reds force precise paint mixing.
